courses.title: Power BI Analytics
courses.description: After completing this course, you’ll be able to import and transform data, and create powerful interactive dashboards in Power BI to streamline your analysis.

courses.title: Statistics Essentials
courses.description: By the end of this course, you’ll understand the core concepts of statistics, spot misleading data, and use visualizations and tests to communicate insights confidently.

courses.title: Data Analysis with Python
courses.description: After this course, you’ll be comfortable using Python and Pandas in Jupyter Lab to clean, analyze, and visualize datasets for meaningful insights.

courses.title: SQL Fundamentals
courses.description: Once you finish this course, you’ll be able to write SQL queries to retrieve, filter, and join data, giving you strong skills for managing and analyzing databases.

courses.title: Spreadsheets Insights Proficiency
courses.description: Through this course, you’ll learn how to use Excel to organize, analyze, and interpret data—building on your stats knowledge to uncover insights.

courses.title: Introduction to Python
courses.description: After taking this course, you’ll understand the basics of Python coding—variables, loops, functions—and practice them through hands-on projects.

courses.title: Tableau for Analytics and Visualization
courses.description: By the end of this course, you’ll be skilled at importing data, shaping it with Tableau Prep, and creating interactive dashboards to communicate insights clearly.

courses.title: Introduction to Machine Learning
courses.description: This course will teach you how to apply key machine learning algorithms with Python, preparing and modeling data to solve real-world problems.

courses.title: JMP for Statistical Modeling and Visualization
courses.description: After this course, you’ll know how to use JMP to run advanced statistical analyses, create clear visualizations, and interpret complex data effectively.

courses.title: Advanced Statistical Analysis
courses.description: By completing this course, you’ll gain expertise in advanced tests like ANOVA, regression, and experimental design, equipping you for in-depth data analysis.
